author: juzigu40-ui
title: Supplemental significance clarification for config bootstrap non-transactional issue

claims.claim: Read path triggers migration when config.json is missing
claims.evidence: config.py:~L144 — _load_config_payload returns _migrate_from_state_files(path) when config.json doesn't exist

claims.claim: Migration source enumeration is unsorted (glob) and scalar merge is first-writer
Source state destructively rewritten before durable target persistence
claims.evidence: config.py:~L357-381 — _strip_config_from_state_file rewrites state files before save_config is called

claims.claim: Persisting migrated config is best-effort only
claims.evidence: config.py:~L403-409 — save_config in try/except with log_best_effort_failure

notes: S083 is a follow-up by the same author (@juzigu40-ui) arguing their original S003 submission deserves higher severity. All code references are identical to S003. Not a new finding — it is supplemental commentary on their own prior submission.
